content.en:
Terran.

After Ye Tian came back, he contacted the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor and met with the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor again.

"Master, the Wind King has given an answer!" Ye Tian said unhurriedly, "The Wind King said, the Black Wind Mountain does not accept subsidiary forces, if the Void Heaven One Pulse wants to join the Black Wind Mountain, there is only one way, that is, the Master Zun becomes a Heavenly King of the Black Wind Mountain, and the Void Sky One Pulse becomes a legion of the Black Wind Mountain in the name of the Void Heaven Legion, which is under your direct jurisdiction!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor's face turned pale, and he hurriedly asked again: "Does this mean that the Void Heaven Sect exists in name only, and can only act with the Void Heaven Legion?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"I can think about it!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was entangled.

"Master, you can go back and think slowly, and if you figure it out, tell your disciple!"

Ye Tian didn't urge the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, after all, that's all he could do.

If the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was really unwilling, he was helpless.

He also knew very well that it was very difficult for the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor to make a choice.

After all, before today, he was still the head of a big force, let him become one of the ordinary high-level of another big force, and his own power collapsed in an instant, and he no longer had the name of power, he couldn't accept it all of a sudden.

The incarnation of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was not disbanded, but lived in the human race, thinking slowly.

Day by day.

Three months have passed, and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor has finally made a decision.

------------

"Apprentice, I'm willing to join Black Wind Mountain!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor sighed.

He also knew that he had to make this choice, his relationship with the other Upper Triple Heaven forces was not very good, and joining Black Wind Mountain was the best choice.

If he didn't join, he wouldn't be able to stop those Upper Triple Heaven forces in the future, and he would even die.

But if he joins the Black Wind Mountain, with the blessing of the Black Wind Mountain, he doesn't dare to say anything else, but his safety is guaranteed enough, and as long as he doesn't die, it will not be easy to die.

Of course, if he has to snatch the opportunity to be killed by others, then he can only say that his strength is not good.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor agreed, and the next step was simple.

The consciousness incarnation of the Wind King appeared, and he personally assessed the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and after a simple assessment, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor successfully underwent the assessment and became a Heavenly King of Black Wind Mountain, with a status similar to Ye Tian.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor originally wanted other Dao Ancestors of the Void Heaven Sect to also become Heavenly Kings, but unfortunately his strength was not up to standard, after all, the standards of the Black Wind Mountain Heavenly Kings were also very high.

Therefore, those Dao Ancestors of the Void Heaven Pulse could only be demoted to the commander, deputy commander, and other positions of the Void Heaven Legion.

Subsequently, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor announced to the outside world that he had joined the Black Wind Mountain, and the Void Heaven Pulse officially became the Void Heaven Legion.

This news was conveyed to the Void Heaven Hall of the Void Heaven True Realm, and it was also transmitted back to the Void Heaven Realm.

At first, many people objected, but the opposition was suppressed.

Gradually, the Dao Ancestors and True Monarchs of the Void Heaven lineage accepted the identity of becoming a member of the Void Heaven Legion.

Soon after.

Many True Ancestors of the Void Heaven Legion have settled in the Fire King Small Realm and have been divided into a certain space in the Fire King Small Realm, which is now the Void Sky Space.

The power of the Void Sky Legion is undoubtedly very strong, and it has a huge True Kingdom in its hands, which can provide a large number of geniuses for Black Wind Mountain, so the appearance of the Void Sky Legion is of great benefit to Black Wind Mountain.

The Upper Triple Heaven Forces didn't react much to the Void Heaven Legion, after all, the Void Heaven One Pulse was only a Fifth Heaven Force at best, where would they pay attention to the Void Heaven One Pulse, at most, some True Ancestors would discuss it privately, and it wouldn't attract the attention of those Sevenfold Heaven Dao Ancestors and Supreme Dao Ancestors.

In the blink of an eye.

The Void Heaven Legion's entry into the Black Wind Mountain has stabilized, and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor has gradually accepted the fact of becoming the Heavenly King of the Black Wind Mountain.

But.

The Xuanxu Ancient Realm had not yet been born into the Ancient Realm, so the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor and other Dao Ancestors could not enter the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and could only enter the Black Wind Mountain as an incarnation to deal with some things.

And with the passage of time, Ye Tian's cultivation gradually entered the shackles, because he had reached the extreme of the Supreme True Ancestor.

"The forbidden body has been tempered to sixty percent nine, and it really can't be tempered any more!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Now he really can't enter, no matter how he defies the sky, he can't break the shackles, after all, the Supreme True Ancestor is the ultimate of the True Ancestor, and he has no way to open up a new True Ancestor realm above the Supreme True Ancestor level.

If he is really so awesome, I am afraid that he can change the rules of the Dark Forbidden Realm with a single word, and make his own rules!

......

After Ye Tian's strength reached the extreme of the Supreme True Ancestor, he rarely cultivated, but turned to teach his own pair of children, and also guided his wife and sister to cultivate, so that they could continue to improve their strength.

Under Ye Tian's unremitting efforts, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue have stepped into the invincible Dao Ancestor's combat power, while Xiao Yue and Ye Yu are constantly making progress towards the Invincible True Ancestor, but this step is very difficult.

Ye Yu also got a natal talent fruit from Ye Xingyue, and also gave birth to a Dao-level natal talent, but getting a Dao-level natal talent does not mean that he can step into the extreme of the invincible Dao Ancestor.

The Invincible Dao Ancestor Extreme is a very difficult level to reach, and there are so many Invincible True Ancestors in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and few people have been promoted to this level.

But.

In the following years, Ye Tian fooled Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue, and Xiao Yue into refining this treasure on the pretext that he had obtained some kind of supreme treasure, and actually secretly gave them Dao-level natal talent.

Under such circumstances, Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue, Xiao Yue, and Ye Yu all got Dao-level natal talents that were very suitable for them.

With a variety of Dao-level natal talents, they cultivated a Thousand Dao Techniques in one sect, and there were almost no defects, coupled with the continuous refining of the forbidden body, their combat effectiveness improved very quickly.

100,000 years!

Millions of years!

Finally, another three million years have passed in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

At this time, Ye Xingchen reached the top invincible Dao Ancestor combat power, Ye Xingyue also reached the top invincible Dao Ancestor combat power, and Ye Yu reached the top invincible Dao Ancestor combat power.

Xiao Yue's combat power was the strongest, after all, she had received Ye Tian's special care, and countless resources were supplied to her, so she directly stepped into the extreme combat power of the Invincible Dao Ancestor.

Maybe give Xiao Yue a chance, she can step into the ranks of the Supreme True Ancestor, after all, her shackles have long been broken by the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart, and the hope of stepping into the Supreme True Ancestor is very huge.

this day.

Ouyang Jiu'er informed Ye Tian that it would not be long before the Xuanxu Ancient Realm would be promoted!
